subject: DeleteView
old: DeleteView handled object deletion directly in delete()
new: DeleteView now uses FormMixin; object deletion for POST requests is handled in form_valid()
truth: Custom delete logic in DeleteView.delete() must be moved to form_valid() or a shared helper method
quote: In accordance with FormMixin, object deletion for POST requests is handled in form_valid(). Custom delete logic in delete() handlers should be moved to form_valid(), or a shared helper method, as needed.

from_fact: deleteview handled object deletion directly in delete()
deleteview now uses formmixin; object deletion for post requests is handled in form_valid()

subject: django-db-logger
old: did not pass database alias as extra context
new: now passes database alias as extra context with each SQL call message
truth: The database alias is now passed as extra context along with each message to the django-db-logger logger, which may break code that parses or expects the old log message format.
quote: The alias of the database used in an SQL call is now passed as extra context

from_fact: did not pass database alias as extra context
now passes database alias as extra context with each sql call message

subject: PostGIS 2.3 support
truth: Stop using PostGIS 2.3; it is no longer supported.
quote: Support for PostGIS 2.3 is removed.

subject: GDAL 2.0 support
truth: Stop using GDAL 2.0; it is no longer supported.
quote: Support for GDAL 2.0 and GEOS 3.5 is removed.

subject: GEOS 3.5 support
truth: Stop using GEOS 3.5; it is no longer supported.
quote: Support for GDAL 2.0 and GEOS 3.5 is removed.

subject: PostgreSQL 9.6 support
truth: Stop using PostgreSQL 9.6; Django 4.0 requires PostgreSQL 10 or higher.
quote: Upstream support for PostgreSQL 9.6 ends in November 2021. Django 4.0 supports PostgreSQL 10 and higher.

subject: Oracle 12.2 and 18c support
truth: Stop using Oracle 12.2 or 18c; Django 4.0 officially supports Oracle 19c.
quote: officially supports Oracle 19c.

subject: CSRF_TRUSTED_ORIGINS format
new: values must include scheme and asterisk before dot (e.g. 'https://*.example.com')
truth: Stop using hostname-only values in CSRF_TRUSTED_ORIGINS; values must now include the scheme (e.g. 'https://') and an asterisk before any leading dot.
quote: Also, values that started with a dot, must now also include an asterisk before

from_fact: values must include scheme and asterisk before dot (e.g. 'https://*.example.com')

subject: DeleteView deletion logic
old: custom deletion logic in delete() handlers
new: move to form_valid() or shared helper method
truth: Stop putting custom deletion logic in DeleteView.delete(); put it in form_valid() or a shared helper method instead.
quote: any custom deletion logic in delete() handlers should be moved to form_valid(), or a shared helper method, if required.

from_fact: custom deletion logic in delete() handlers
move to form_valid() or shared helper method

subject: Oracle table/column naming scheme
truth: Oracle tables and columns with names longer than 30 characters must be renamed using the upgrade script in ticket #33789.
quote: Django 4.0 inadvertently changed the table and column naming scheme on Oracle. This causes errors for models and fields with names longer than 30 characters. Unfortunately, renaming some Oracle tables and columns is required.

subject: cx_Oracle support
truth: Stop using cx_Oracle versions older than 7.0; they are no longer supported.
quote: Support for cx_Oracle < 7.0 is removed.

subject: sliced queryset unsupported operations
truth: Unsupported operations on a sliced queryset now raise TypeError instead of AssertionError.
quote: Unsupported operations on a sliced queryset now raise TypeError instead of AssertionError.

subject: reorder_suite() function
truth: Stop using django.test.runner.reorder_suite(); use reorder_tests() instead — it now accepts an iterable of tests and returns an iterator.
quote: The undocumented django.test.runner.reorder_suite() function is renamed to reorder_tests(). It now accepts an iterable of tests rather than a test suite, and returns an iterator of tests.

subject: FileSystemStorage.delete() with empty name
truth: Calling FileSystemStorage.delete() with an empty name now raises ValueError instead of AssertionError.
quote: Calling FileSystemStorage.delete() with an empty name now raises ValueError instead of AssertionError.

subject: EmailMultiAlternatives.attach_alternative() / EmailMessage.attach() invalid args
truth: Calling attach_alternative() or attach() with invalid content or mimetype now raises ValueError instead of AssertionError.
quote: Calling EmailMultiAlternatives.attach_alternative() or EmailMessage.attach() with an invalid content or mimetype arguments now raise ValueError instead of AssertionError.

subject: assertHTMLEqual non-boolean attribute comparison
old: non-boolean attribute without value equals attribute with same name and value
new: they are no longer considered equal
truth: assertHTMLEqual no longer considers a non-boolean attribute without a value equal to an attribute with the same name and value.
quote: assertHTMLEqual no longer considers a non-boolean attribute without a value equal to an attribute with the same name and value.

from_fact: non-boolean attribute without value equals attribute with same name and value
they are no longer considered equal

subject: test --tag with failing test load
old: tests that fail to load may not match --tag
new: they now always match when using --tag
truth: Tests that fail to load (e.g. due to syntax errors) now always match when using test --tag, which may cause previously-skipped failing tests to run.
quote: Tests that fail to load, for example due to syntax errors, now always match

from_fact: tests that fail to load may not match --tag
they now always match when using --tag

subject: lookup_needs_distinct() function
truth: Stop using lookup_needs_distinct(); use lookup_spawns_duplicates() instead.
quote: The undocumented django.contrib.admin.utils.lookup_needs_distinct() function is renamed to lookup_spawns_duplicates().

subject: HttpRequest.get_raw_uri()
truth: Stop using HttpRequest.get_raw_uri(); use HttpRequest.build_absolute_uri() as a suitable alternative.
quote: :meth:`.HttpRequest.build_absolute_uri` method may be a suitable alternative.

subject: ModelAdmin log_addition/log_change/log_deletion argument name
truth: The object argument of ModelAdmin.log_addition(), log_change(), and log_deletion() is renamed to obj.
quote: The object argument of undocumented ModelAdmin.log_addition(), log_change(), and log_deletion() methods is renamed to obj.

subject: Migrations autodetector ForeignKey/ManyToManyField
new: no-op AlterField operations may be generated
truth: Migration operations for ForeignKey and ManyToManyField no longer specify attributes not passed during initialization, which may cause makemigrations to generate no-op AlterField operations.
quote: migration operations for ForeignKey and ManyToManyField fields no longer specify attributes which were not passed to the fields during initialization. As a side-effect, running makemigrations might generate no-op AlterField operations for ManyToManyField and ForeignKey fields in some cases.

from_fact: no-op alterfield operations may be generated

subject: RssFeed, Atom1Feed, and subclasses
old: elements with no content emitted as opening+closing tags
new: elements with no content emitted as self-closing tags
truth: RssFeed, Atom1Feed, and their subclasses now emit elements with no content as self-closing tags instead of opening+closing tags.
quote: :class:`~django.utils.feedgenerator.RssFeed`, :class:`~django.utils.feedgenerator.Atom1Feed`, and their subclasses now emit elements with no content as self-closing tags.

from_fact: elements with no content emitted as opening+closing tags
elements with no content emitted as self-closing tags

subject: RadioSelect and CheckboxSelectMultiple widget rendering
old: rendered in <ul> tags (or similar non-<div> tags)
truth: RadioSelect and CheckboxSelectMultiple widgets are now rendered in <div> tags instead of the previous markup, affecting screen reader announcements.
quote: :class:`~django.forms.CheckboxSelectMultiple` widgets are now rendered in

from_fact: rendered in <ul> tags (or similar non-<div> tags)

subject: default sitemap protocol
truth: The default sitemap protocol for sitemaps built outside a request context will change from 'http' to 'https' in Django 5.0.
quote: The default sitemap protocol for sitemaps built outside the context of a

subject: isnull lookup
new: only allows boolean values as RHS
truth: The isnull lookup no longer allows using non-boolean values as the right-hand side.
quote: The :lookup:`isnull` lookup no longer allows using non-boolean values as the right-hand side.

from_fact: only allows boolean values as rhs

subject: django.db.models.query_utils.InvalidQuery
truth: Stop using InvalidQuery exception class; it no longer exists.
quote: The django.db.models.query_utils.InvalidQuery exception class is removed.

subject: django-admin.py
truth: Stop using django-admin.py; use django-admin instead.
quote: The django-admin.py entry point is removed.

subject: HttpRequest.is_ajax()
truth: Stop calling is_ajax() on HttpRequest; it no longer exists.
quote: The HttpRequest.is_ajax() method is removed.

subject: pre-Django 3.1 cookie encoding in CookieStorage
old: pre-Django 3.1 encoding format of cookie values used by django.contrib.messages.storage.cookie.CookieStorage
truth: Stop relying on pre-Django 3.1 cookie encoding format in CookieStorage; only the new format is supported.
quote: Support for the pre-Django 3.1 encoding format of cookies values used by django.contrib.messages.storage.cookie.CookieStorage is removed.

from_fact: pre-django 3.1 encoding format of cookie values used by django.contrib.messages.storage.cookie.cookiestorage

subject: pre-Django 3.1 SHA-1 password reset tokens in admin
old: pre-Django 3.1 password reset tokens using SHA-1 in the admin site
truth: Stop using pre-Django 3.1 SHA-1 password reset tokens in the admin; they are no longer accepted.
quote: Support for the pre-Django 3.1 password reset tokens in the admin site (that use the SHA-1 hashing algorithm) is removed.

from_fact: pre-django 3.1 password reset tokens using sha-1 in the admin site

subject: pre-Django 3.1 session encoding format
truth: Stop relying on pre-Django 3.1 session encoding format; only the new format is supported.
quote: Support for the pre-Django 3.1 encoding format of sessions is removed.

subject: pre-Django 3.1 SHA-1 Signer signatures
old: pre-Django 3.1 django.core.signing.Signer signatures encoded with SHA-1
truth: Stop using pre-Django 3.1 SHA-1 Signer signatures; they are no longer accepted.
quote: Support for the pre-Django 3.1 django.core.signing.Signer signatures (encoded with the SHA-1 algorithm) is removed.

from_fact: pre-django 3.1 django.core.signing.signer signatures encoded with sha-1

subject: pre-Django 3.1 SHA-1 dumps signatures in loads()
truth: Stop relying on loads() accepting pre-Django 3.1 SHA-1 dumps signatures; only new format signatures are accepted.
quote: Support for the pre-Django 3.1 django.core.signing.Signer signatures (encoded with the SHA-1 algorithm) is removed.

subject: pre-Django 3.1 SHA-1 user sessions
old: pre-Django 3.1 user sessions using SHA-1 algorithm
truth: Stop relying on pre-Django 3.1 SHA-1 user sessions; they are no longer supported.
quote: Support for the pre-Django 3.1 user sessions (that use the SHA-1 algorithm) is removed.

from_fact: pre-django 3.1 user sessions using sha-1 algorithm

subject: MiddlewareMixin.__init__() get_response argument
new: get_response argument is required and cannot be None
truth: Stop passing None as get_response to MiddlewareMixin.__init__(); it is now required.
quote: The get_response argument for django.utils.deprecation.MiddlewareMixin.__init__() is required and doesn't accept None.

from_fact: get_response argument is required and cannot be none

subject: Signal providing_args argument
truth: Stop passing providing_args to Signal(); it is removed.
quote: The providing_args argument for django.dispatch.Signal is removed.

subject: get_random_string() length argument
truth: Stop calling get_random_string() without the length argument; it is now required.
quote: The length argument for django.utils.crypto.get_random_string() is required.

subject: ModelMultipleChoiceField list message
truth: Stop relying on the 'list' message for ModelMultipleChoiceField; it is removed.
quote: The list message for ModelMultipleChoiceField is removed.

subject: passing raw column aliases to QuerySet.order_by()
old: support for passing raw column aliases to QuerySet.order_by()
truth: Stop passing raw column aliases to order_by(); they are no longer supported.
quote: Support for passing raw column aliases to QuerySet.order_by() is removed.

from_fact: support for passing raw column aliases to queryset.order_by()

subject: NullBooleanField model field
truth: Stop using NullBooleanField model field; it is removed except in historical migrations.
quote: The NullBooleanField model field is removed, except for support in historical migrations.

subject: django.conf.urls.url()
truth: Stop using django.conf.urls.url(); use path() or re_path() instead.
quote: django.conf.urls.url() is removed.

subject: django.contrib.postgres.fields.JSONField
truth: Stop using django.contrib.postgres.fields.JSONField; use the core models.JSONField instead.
quote: The django.contrib.postgres.fields.JSONField model field is removed, except for support in historical migrations.

subject: postgres KeyTransform and KeyTextTransform
truth: Stop using KeyTransform and KeyTextTransform from postgres jsonb; they are removed.
quote: django.contrib.postgres.fields.jsonb.KeyTransform and django.contrib.postgres.fields.jsonb.KeyTextTransform are removed.

subject: django.contrib.postgres.forms.JSONField
truth: Stop using django.contrib.postgres.forms.JSONField; use the core forms.JSONField instead.
quote: django.contrib.postgres.forms.JSONField is removed.

subject: {% ifequal %} and {% ifnotequal %} template tags
truth: Stop using {% ifequal %} and {% ifnotequal %} template tags; use {% if %} with == or != instead.
quote: The {% ifequal %} and {% ifnotequal %} template tags are removed.

subject: DEFAULT_HASHING_ALGORITHM setting
truth: Stop using the DEFAULT_HASHING_ALGORITHM setting; it is removed.
quote: The DEFAULT_HASHING_ALGORITHM transitional setting is removed.

subject: Field.choices and ChoiceField.choices
old: Enumeration types required accessing .choices attribute (e.g., choices=Medal.choices)
new: Enumeration types can be passed directly without .choices (e.g., choices=Medal)
truth: Stop using .choices when passing enumeration types to Field.choices; pass the enum class directly instead.
quote: or an :ref:`field-choices-enum-types` subclass, but the latter required

from_fact: enumeration types required accessing .choices attribute (e.g., choices=medal.choices)
enumeration types can be passed directly without .choices (e.g., choices=medal)

subject: PBKDF2 password hasher default iteration count
truth: The default PBKDF2 iteration count increased from 600,000 to 720,000, which will slow down password hashing and verification.
quote: The default iteration count for the PBKDF2 password hasher is increased from 600,000 to 720,000.

subject: UUIDField on MariaDB 10.7+
truth: On MariaDB 10.7+, UUIDField now creates a UUID column instead of a CHAR(32) column, requiring a migration.
quote: On MariaDB 10.7+, UUIDField is now created as UUID column rather than CHAR(32) column.

subject: GDAL 2.2 and 2.3 support
truth: Stop using GDAL 2.2 and 2.3; they are no longer supported.
quote: Support for GDAL 2.2 and 2.3 is removed.

subject: GEOS 3.6 and 3.7 support
truth: Stop using GEOS 3.6 and 3.7; they are no longer supported.
quote: Support for GEOS 3.6 and 3.7 is removed.

subject: django.contrib.sitemaps.ping_google() function and ping_google management command
truth: Stop using ping_google() and the ping_google management command; they have been removed.
quote: The django.contrib.sitemaps.ping_google() function and the ping_google management command are removed as the Google Sitemaps ping endpoint is deprecated and will be removed in January 2024.

subject: django.contrib.sitemaps.SitemapNotFound exception
truth: Stop using SitemapNotFound; it has been removed.
quote: The django.contrib.sitemaps.SitemapNotFound exception class is removed.

subject: MySQL minimum supported version
truth: Stop using MySQL versions older than 8.0.11; Django now requires MySQL 8.0.11 or higher.
quote: Support for pre-releases of MySQL 8.0.x series is removed. Django 5.0 supports MySQL 8.0.11 and higher.

subject: QuerySet.update_or_create with field named create_defaults
old: Using create_defaults as a field name in update_or_create lookups
truth: If a model has a field named 'create_defaults', you must use create_defaults__exact in update_or_create() lookups instead of bare create_defaults.
quote: As a consequence, any models that have a field named create_defaults that are used with an update_or_create() should specify the field in the lookup with create_defaults__exact.

from_fact: using create_defaults as a field name in update_or_create lookups

subject: UUIDField on MariaDB 10.7+
old: UUIDField created as CHAR(32) on MariaDB 10.7+
new: UUIDField created as UUID column on MariaDB 10.7+
truth: On MariaDB 10.7+, UUIDField now creates a UUID column instead of CHAR(32); existing UUIDFields from Django <5.0 must be replaced with a subclass backed by CHAR(32) to avoid breakage.
quote: On MariaDB 10.7+, UUIDField is now created as UUID column rather than CHAR(32) column. As a consequence, any UUIDField created in Django < 5.0 should be replaced with a UUIDField subclass backed by CHAR(32)

from_fact: uuidfield created as char(32) on mariadb 10.7+
uuidfield created as uuid column on mariadb 10.7+

subject: BaseModelFormSet.save_existing() instance argument
truth: Stop using the 'instance' argument name in BaseModelFormSet.save_existing(); it has been renamed to 'obj'.
quote: The instance argument of the undocumented BaseModelFormSet.save_existing() method is renamed to obj.

subject: django.contrib.admin.helpers.checkbox
truth: Stop using django.contrib.admin.helpers.checkbox as it has been removed.
quote: The undocumented django.contrib.admin.helpers.checkbox is removed.

subject: Integer field validation on SQLite
old: Integer fields validated as 32-bit on SQLite
new: Integer fields validated as 64-bit on SQLite
truth: Integer fields are now validated as 64-bit integers on SQLite instead of 32-bit.
quote: Integer fields are now validated as 64-bit integers on SQLite to match the behavior of sqlite3.

from_fact: integer fields validated as 32-bit on sqlite
integer fields validated as 64-bit on sqlite

subject: Query.annotation_select_mask
old: Query.annotation_select_mask was a set of strings
new: Query.annotation_select_mask is an ordered list of strings
truth: Query.annotation_select_mask is now an ordered list of strings instead of a set of strings.
quote: The undocumented Query.annotation_select_mask attribute is changed from a set of strings to an ordered list of strings.

from_fact: query.annotation_select_mask was a set of strings
query.annotation_select_mask is an ordered list of strings

subject: ImageField.update_dimension_fields() post_init behavior
old: ImageField.update_dimension_fields() called on post_init even when width_field and height_field not set
new: ImageField.update_dimension_fields() no longer called on post_init if width_field and height_field are not set
truth: ImageField.update_dimension_fields() is no longer called on the post_init signal when width_field and height_field are not set.
quote: ImageField.update_dimension_fields() is no longer called on the post_init signal if width_field and height_field are not set.

from_fact: imagefield.update_dimension_fields() called on post_init even when width_field and height_field not set
imagefield.update_dimension_fields() no longer called on post_init if width_field and height_field are not set

subject: Now() database function on Oracle
truth: The Now() database function now uses LOCALTIMESTAMP instead of CURRENT_TIMESTAMP on Oracle.
quote: :class:~django.db.models.functions.Now database function now uses LOCALTIMESTAMP instead of CURRENT_TIMESTAMP on Oracle.

subject: AdminSite.site_header HTML tag
truth: AdminSite.site_header is now rendered in a <div> tag instead of <h1>.
quote: :attr:.AdminSite.site_header is now rendered in a <div> tag instead of <h1>.

subject: Admin main content and header HTML tags
old: Admin main content and header rendered in <div> tags
new: Admin main content rendered in <main>, header content rendered in <header>
truth: The admin's main content area is now rendered in a <main> tag and header content area in a <header> tag instead of <div>.
quote: the admin's main content area and header content area are now rendered in a <main> and <header> tag instead of <div>.

from_fact: admin main content and header rendered in <div> tags
admin main content rendered in <main>, header content rendered in <header>

subject: XOR operator behavior on databases without native XOR
old: ^ XOR operator returned rows matched by exactly one operand
new: ^ XOR operator returns rows matched by an odd number of operands
truth: On databases without native XOR support, the ^ XOR operator now returns rows matched by an odd number of operands instead of exactly one operand.
quote: On databases without native support for the SQL XOR operator, ^ as the exclusive or (XOR) operator now returns rows that are matched by an odd number of operands rather than exactly one operand.

from_fact: ^ xor operator returned rows matched by exactly one operand
^ xor operator returns rows matched by an odd number of operands

subject: Minimum asgiref version
truth: The minimum supported version of asgiref is increased from 3.6.0 to 3.7.0.
quote: The minimum supported version of asgiref is increased from 3.6.0 to 3.7.0.

subject: Minimum selenium version
truth: The minimum supported version of selenium is increased from 3.8.0 to 4.8.0.
quote: The minimum supported version of selenium is increased from 3.8.0 to 4.8.0.

subject: AlreadyRegistered and NotRegistered exceptions
truth: Import AlreadyRegistered and NotRegistered from django.contrib.admin.exceptions instead of django.contrib.admin.sites.
quote: The AlreadyRegistered and NotRegistered exceptions are moved from django.contrib.admin.sites to django.contrib.admin.exceptions.

subject: Minimum SQLite version
truth: The minimum supported version of SQLite is increased from 3.21.0 to 3.27.0.
quote: The minimum supported version of SQLite is increased from 3.21.0 to 3.27.0.

subject: Support for cx_Oracle < 8.3
truth: Support for cx_Oracle versions older than 8.3 is removed.
quote: Support for cx_Oracle < 8.3 is removed.

subject: Executing SQL queries before app registry populated
old: Executing SQL queries before app registry populated was allowed
new: Executing SQL queries before app registry populated raises RuntimeWarning
truth: Executing SQL queries before the app registry has been fully populated now raises RuntimeWarning.

executing sql queries before app registry populated raises runtimewarning

old: Non-UTF-8 encoded requests with application/x-www-form-urlencoded were accepted
new: Non-UTF-8 encoded requests with application/x-www-form-urlencoded raise BadRequest

truth: The minimum supported version of colorama is increased to 0.4.6.
quote: The minimum supported version of colorama is increased to 0.4.6.

subject: Minimum docutils version
truth: The minimum supported version of docutils is increased to 0.19.
quote: The minimum supported version of docutils is increased to 0.19.

old: Filtering querysets against overflowing integer values could return results
new: Filtering querysets against overflowing integer values always returns empty queryset

filtering querysets against overflowing integer values always returns empty queryset

subject: DjangoDivFormRenderer and Jinja2DivFormRenderer
truth: DjangoDivFormRenderer and Jinja2DivFormRenderer transitional form renderers are deprecated.

truth: get_joining_columns() of ForeignObject and ForeignObjectRel is deprecated; subclasses should implement get_joining_fields() instead.

subject: ForeignObject.get_reverse_joining_columns()
truth: The ForeignObject.get_reverse_joining_columns() method is deprecated.

old: default form and formset rendering style (table-based)
truth: The default form and formset rendering style is now div-based instead of the previous style.

truth: Stop using GeoModelAdmin and OSMGeoAdmin; use GISModelAdmin instead.

subject: CSRF protection
old: CSRF protection did not consult the Origin header
new: CSRF protection now consults the Origin header, if present
truth: CSRF_TRUSTED_ORIGINS setting must be updated to include the scheme and port (e.g. 'https://example.com:443') because CSRF now consults the Origin header

subject: SecurityMiddleware
old: did not add Cross-Origin Opener Policy header
new: now adds Cross-Origin Opener Policy header with value 'same-origin' by default
truth: SecurityMiddleware now adds a Cross-Origin Opener Policy header with value 'same-origin' by default, which may break cross-origin popups that relied on sharing the same browsing context.
quote: value of ``'same-origin'`` to prevent cross-origin popups from sharing the

from_fact: did not add cross-origin opener policy header
now adds cross-origin opener policy header with value 'same-origin' by default

subject: shell command
old: loaded readline even in isolated mode
new: no longer loads readline if running in isolated mode
truth: The shell command no longer loads readline when running in isolated mode, which may break interactive history features in isolated mode.
quote: As a consequence, ``readline`` is no longer loaded if running in *isolated

from_fact: loaded readline even in isolated mode
no longer loads readline if running in isolated mode

subject: SECURE_BROWSER_XSS_FILTER setting and X-XSS-Protection header
old: SECURE_BROWSER_XSS_FILTER setting (True) caused SecurityMiddleware to set X-XSS-Protection header
truth: Stop using SECURE_BROWSER_XSS_FILTER setting; it is removed and SecurityMiddleware no longer sets the X-XSS-Protection header.

subject: AdminSite index view caching
old: never_cache decorator always applied to admin index view
new: never_cache not applied when accessed directly (not via AdminSite.urls or get_urls())

subject: NodeList.render()
old: cast output of Node.render() to string
new: no longer casts output to string

from_fact: cast output of node.render() to string
no longer casts output to string

old: depended on USE_L10N setting, returned non-localized output when USE_L10N=False

no longer depends on use_l10n, always returns localized output
